summary: Widened point count spread across quality tiers (high: 2000/1000/1600, medium: 800/550/700, low: 200/150/200 unchanged), extracted shared computeAdaptiveCount helper with 24-point minimum floor, refactored all four geometry systems to use the shared helper, and added 11 acceptance tests covering desktop≥5× mobile ratio, volumetric depth preservation, no 2D fallback, formula consistency, density mapping spread, cap enforcement, and privacy compliance. Build passes, all 949 tests green.
